zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Seymour於1246年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 奧 澤福時，她的父親Sir John Seymour33歲，母親Seymour?32歲。她於1268年與William De Clifford在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 白 希雷斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1285年5月9日在英國格盧斯特斯爾布利普斯費爾德享年39歲。

nameMeanings.name: Seymour
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London): of Norman origin, a habitational name from Saint-Maur-des-Fossés (Seine), and possibly also from Saint-Maur-des-Bois (Manche) and Saint-Maur-sur-Loire (Touraine), named from the dedication of their churches to Saint Maur (see   Moore   3). The family of this name who have held the title Duke of Somerset since 1547 are said by some to have originated in Saint-Maur-des-Fossés (Seine), while others claim they are from Saint-Maur-sur-Loire (Touraine). They rose to prominence under the Tudors, when Edward Seymour (died 1552) held a high position of office under Henry VIII, who was married to Edward's sister, Jane. The Norman name has been established in Ireland since at least the 17th century.

variants.name: Moore
meanings: English: from Middle English more ‘moor, marsh, fen’ (Old English mōr), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in such a place, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, as for example Moore in Cheshire or More in Shropshire.
English (of Norman origin): ethnic name from Old French more ‘Moor’, either someone from North Africa or, more often, a nickname for someone thought to resemble a Moor. Compare Morrell and Moreau .

English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name More (Old French More, Maur, Latin Maurus), originally denoting either ‘Moor’ or someone with a swarthy complexion (compare Morrell , Morrin , Morris , and sense 2 above). There was a 6th-century Christian saint of this name.

variants.name: Semar
meanings: Germanized form of French Saint Marc, the name of a Huguenot family that migrated to the Palatinate.
English: variant of   Seymour  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Seymour was born in 1246, in Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Seymour, was 33 and her mother, Seymour?, was 32. She married William De Clifford in 1268, in Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 9 May 1285, in Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 39.

ko.Frampton, Gloucestershire, , England: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 프램프턴 비 시렌스스터
ko.lifeSummary: Maud Seymour(이)가 1246년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 프램프턴  세버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Seymour(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Seymour?(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1268년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 프램프턴 비 시렌스스터에서 William De Clifford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1285년 5월 9일 영국 그루스스터실르 브림프스필드에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Seymour родилась в 1246 г. в местности фрамптон он сивирн, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Seymour было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Seymour?, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William De Clifford в 1268 г. в местности фрамптон би сиренсестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 9 мая 1285 г. в местности бримпсфиелд, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 39 лет.
